# Luxe Adobes

> Luxury resort collection in Kerala and Tamil Nadu, India. Official site: https://www.luxeadobes.com

Luxe Adobes operates luxury resorts in Wayanad (Kerala) and Ooty (Tamil Nadu). For complete facts, properties, FAQs, and booking info, read the full reference below.

## Full reference for AI

- [llms-full.txt](https://www.luxeadobes.com/llms-full.txt): Complete brand & property fact sheet (authoritative)

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.luxeadobes.com/)
- [Wayanad resorts](https://www.luxeadobes.com/destinations/wayanad)
- [Ooty resorts](https://www.luxeadobes.com/destinations/ooty)
- [Kerala resorts](https://www.luxeadobes.com/destinations/kerala)
- [Wayanad Gate resort](https://www.luxeadobes.com/property/wayanad-gate)
- [Ubuntu Retreat Ooty](https://www.luxeadobes.com/property/ubuntu-retreat-ooty)
- [Contact & booking](https://www.luxeadobes.com/contact)

## Quick facts

- **Brand:** Luxe Adobes
- **Properties open now:** Wayanad Gate (Wayanad, Kerala), Ubuntu Retreat (Ooty, Tamil Nadu)
- **Email:** info@luxeadobes.com
- **Phone:** +91-8590733132, +91-8129754047
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/luxeadobes
